name: Lemon Poppy Seed Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder and salt.
3. In a large mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
4. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Alternately add the flour mixture with sour cream, lemon juice and vanilla; beat at low speed until blended.
6. Fold in poppy seeds and lemon peel.
7. Fill muffin cups 2/3 full with batter and sprinkle tops with additional sugar.
8. Bake for 18-20 minutes.
